{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The previous owner of Snail Shell was called the Nightmare Doll. They asked a question before travelling: Will there be cabbage? No one knew if Gaia answered before they made the journey.
|affct=ART
|hard=HP
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=5695
|relic1=Haunted Cabinet
|relic2=Andersen's Fairytales
|relic3=Paradise Lost
|relic4=Killing Stone
|relic5=Pinocchio
}}
|color=blue
|earth=3
|water=3
|fire=4
|wind=4
|form=Demon
|element=Wind
|realm=Britland
|orangehard=HP
}}
